message:
feat(core): mux_pool Cx-aware async methods + runtime_compat consolidation

ASUPERSYNC capability context (Cx) threading through MuxPool:
- All public MuxPool methods now have _with_cx() variants that accept
  explicit Cx: list_panes_with_cx, get_lines_with_cx,
  get_pane_render_changes_with_cx, get_pane_render_changes_batch_with_cx,
  write_to_pane_with_cx, send_paste_with_cx, health_check_with_cx
- acquire_client_with_cx(): pool acquisition + connection creation
  wrapped in cx::with_cx_async for cooperative scheduling
- execute_with_recovery_with_cx(): retry delay wrapped in cx::with_cx_async
- 2 new tests: pool_list_panes_with_cx_succeeds,
  pool_health_check_with_cx_success

Runtime compatibility cleanup:
- Move watch_has_changed, watch_borrow_and_update_clone, mpsc_recv_option
  from runtime.rs into runtime_compat module (avoiding duplication)
- Fix mpsc send argument order: tx.send(value, &cx) → tx.send(&cx, value)
  in ipc.rs and native_events.rs to match updated asupersync API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
